violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Bare wood palette under fridge, back of prep counter have exposed wood. Must be sealed/made non absorbing.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Handwash sink must be clear of equipment. Used only for hand washing. Equipment stored in sink at time of inspection.
